name: Greek Deviled Eggs with Ouzo
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the egg yolks with ouzo into a smooth paste.
2. Combine the parsley, mint, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
3. Blend both mixtures together until smooth.
4. Fill each egg white with the mixture.
5. Garnish with chopped black olives.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve. The anise-flavored liqueur makes these eggs fragrant and delicious.
